title: Light Shattering Syrian Comte Grill
description: A rich and savory, whole30-friendly dish featuring the flavors of Syria, with the added complexity of char-grilled comte cheese, all wrapped in an agave leaf vessel. The result is a shattering, light, and utterly indulgent experience.

ingredients.name: Comte cheese
ingredients.notes: rich and creamy, perfect for shattering

ingredients.name: Agave leaves
ingredients.notes: large enough to wrap the cheese

instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, around 400°F (200°C).
Brush the agave leaves with olive oil and place a comte cheese cube in the center of each leaf.
Sprinkle minced garlic and fresh thyme over the cheese.
Wrap the leaves around the cheese and secure with a toothpick, if needed.
Place the cheese packets on the grill and cook for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until the cheese is melted and the leaves are char-grilled.
Remove from heat and sprinkle with paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Serve immediately, allowing the cheese to shatter and the flavors to meld together.
